steps.title: Use the operating-cost clue
steps.content: The passage says many companies could not operate if they had to find investors by themselves. The blank must describe time and expense so great that the task would become impractical.

steps.title: Reject mismatched words
steps.content: Choice A means distinctive, which does not describe an obstacle. Choice B means misunderstood, which is unrelated to cost or effort. Choice D means helpful, the opposite of a burden that could keep companies from operating. The answer is C.
